name: Venison Savory Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 package Top Ramen Beef Flavored Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash vegetables and potatoes briskly but do not remove skins.
2. Fill large crock pot half full with clean cold water.
3. Add the following ingredients to the crock pot: Venison roast, white wine, Worcestershire sauce, lentils, diced cucumber, jalapeño pepper, chopped banana peppers, quartered potatoes, Fiber One box, Top Ramen noodles, Triscuit crackers, and Ranch dip mix.
4. Cook on low heat for 12-16 hours.
5. During the last hour of cooking, season as desired by adding bay leaves or other herbs to taste. This recipe can be made with any game animal; squirrel is too stringy for some preferences but works well with venison. It pairs nicely with beef and thick hearty stews are recommended.
